summary: Made two surgical seam edits: clarified that Chapter 5 begins the evening after Chapter 4's dawn aftermath, and strengthened the handoff into Chapter 6 by cueing the guano-dusted observation platform and preview-weekend prep awaiting the next morning.
edits: Added a minimal opening time anchor to place the scene on the next evening after Chapter 4.
Added a forward-seam cue tying the return to camp to the guano-dusted observation platform and preview-weekend prep seen at Chapter 6's opening.
